Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
ACO Pioneer V2 Codebook │ May 2025 │ V 1.1 5 

CCN_TYPE 

LABEL: CCN Facility Type 

DESCRIPTION: This field describes the alignment for the Participant Provider. 

SHORT NAME: CCN_TYPE 

LONG NAME: CCN_TYPE 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: CMS Participating Provider Pioneer ACO RIF 

VALUES: C = Certified 
X = Excluded 
R = Removed 
F = Failure to find
